subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Make this sinner to be detached from all else save Thee and captivate him with Thy love; free him from the bonds and fetters of passion and desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگاراين گنهکار را از اغيار بيزار نما و بمحبّت خويش گرفتار نما از بند و کمند هوی و هوس رها کن
subcodes.subjects: @prayers (general or uncategorized), @status of material wealth; wealth and poverty, @prayer for detachment, @love of God
